message:
feat(calibrate): add trend detection and classification for resource trajectories

Classifies time-series data into stable/increasing/decreasing/periodic/
change-point labels. Uses linear regression, detrended autocorrelation
for periodicity, and sliding-window mean comparison for change points.
Includes time-to-threshold estimation for increasing trends.

Closes process_triage-8smg

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
